productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Navy Blue Check Shirt
description: Composition Blue, red and grey checked shirt, made of 100% cotton, with full arms and buttoned cuffs, spread collar, front buttoned placket , appliqué on the right chest and a pocket on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub, bleach or dry clean Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Get casual, get comfortable in style with this checked shirt from united colors of benetton. The full sleeves are sure to keep the chill away this winter, while you can always roll up the sleeves to suit the occasion. Team this with jeans and casual shoes for that cool, casual look. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
